channel.title: PICA - SISSA - Scuola Internazionale Superiore di Studi Avanzati
channel.description: PICA - SISSA - Scuola Internazionale Superiore di Studi Avanzati

item.title: Bando di selezione pubblica per il conferimento di una borsa per attività di ricerca e di perfezionamento su “Plasticità sinaptica e neuroinfiammazione: interazione in modelli in vitro”
item.description:
Responsabile scientifico: Prof.ssa Laura Ballerini

From: 09-03-2026 13:00
To: 24-03-2026 13:00
Category: Borse di Studio

LINK AL BANDO: Selezione pubblica per il conferimento di una borsa per attività di ricerca e di perfezionamento su "Plasticità sinaptica e neuroinfiammazione: interazione in modelli in vitro” | Scuola Internazionale Superiore di Studi Avanzati


Requisiti:


  • godere dei diritti civili e politici;

  • non aver riportato condanne penali e non essere destinatari di provvedimenti che riguardano l’applicazione di misure di prevenzione, di decisioni civili e di provvedimenti amministrativi;

  • essere a conoscenza di non essere sottoposti a procedimenti penali;

  • Laurea Magistrale in Neuroscienze, Biologia o settori affini

  • Esperienza nella preparazione nell’utilizzo di colture dissociate di ippocampo, elettrofisiologia (patch clamp), immunofluorescenza, microscopia confocale;

  • Livello di conoscenza della lingua inglese: minimo B2

Technical instructions for submitting selection's application

item.title: Bando di selezione pubblica per il conferimento di una borsa per attività di ricerca e di perfezionamento su “Innovazione nella terapia dell’epilessia" presso l’Area di Neuroscienze della SISSA

item.title: Bando di selezione pubblica per il conferimento di una borsa per attività di ricerca e di perfezionamento su "Simulazioni N-body nello scenario di materia oscura non-minimalmente accoppiata"
item.description:
Responsabile scientifico: Prof. Andrea Lapi

From: 10-03-2026 13:00
To: 27-03-2026 13:00
Category: Borse di Studio

ANNOUNCEMENT

N-body simulations in the scenario of non-minimally coupled dark matter

Research activity: Development and analysis of N-body simulations in scenarios of matter with non-minimal coupling to gravity, in fluid approximation


By the deadline for submitting applications for admission to the selection process, candidates must:



  • enjoy civil and political rights have no criminal convictions and not be subject to any preventive measures, civil decisions or administrative measures.




  • be aware that they are not subject to criminal proceedings.




  • hold a bachelor’s degree in physics or Astronomy/Astrophysics, if they hold a single-cycle degree, they must be enrolled in the final year of a degree course in Physics or Astronomy/Astrophysics.




  • Level of English language proficiency: minimum B2



Technical instructions for submitting selection's application

item.title: Selection for the admission to the Molecular and Statistical Biophysics PhD course - Decoding and designing biomolecular systems with hybrid DNA:RNA: protein nanotechnology (BIOHYBRITE)
item.description:
Responsabile del Corso / Head of PhD course: Prof. Cristian MICHELETTI

From: 30-12-2025 13:00
To: 11-05-2026 13:00
Category: Dottorati

Position DC12 - Predictive modelling of translocation properties of nucleic acids and protein assemblies


Primary academic institution: Prof. Cristian Micheletti (SISSA)


Associated advisory team: Prof. Ulrich Keyser, UCAM


Project Description

This PhD project has a planned duration of 48 months, including the 36 months funded under the BioHYBRITE (MSCA Doctoral Networks) action plus an additional 12 months of SISSA fellowship. The project will develop and apply advanced theoretical and computational models for two purposes. First, it will characterize how the structure of nucleic acids, proteins, and their biohybrid assemblies affects their motion through nanopores. The results will then be used to design molecules with desired pore translocation properties.


The theoretical/computational project will involve close international collaborations (planned secondments) with experimental and theoretical partner groups of the BioHybrite network, through which the doctoral researcher will iteratively refine models by comparing them with experiments and, finally, formulate predictions.


Modalità di selezione: Titoli  - scritto - orale (da remoto)

Selection Process:  Academic qualifications - written - interview (remotely)

25/05 - 26 & 27/05/2026

item.title: Selection for the admission to the Theory and Numerical Simulation of the Condensed Matter PhD course - Fellowsiph financed by ICTP
item.description:
Responsabile del Corso / Head of PhD course: Ali Hassanali (ICTP) Giuseppe Santoro

From: 29-01-2026 13:00
To: 03-03-2026 13:00
Category: Dottorati

Duration: 4 years


Amount of the Fellowship: € 1.400,00 net per month plus benfits (see announcement)


Selection Process:  Academic qualifications - interview (16.03 - 20.03.2026)

item.title: Bando di ammissione al corso di PhD in Neuroscienze Cognitive / Selection for the admission to the Cognitive Neuroscience PhD course
item.description:
Responsabile del Corso / Head of PhD course: Prof. Mathew E. Diamond

From: 18-12-2025 13:00
To: 20-03-2026 13:00
Category: Dottorati

Bando di ammissione al corso di PhD in Neuroscienze Cognitive

Selection for the admission to the Cognitive Neuroscience PhD course


Topics:


•             Main topics in cognitive neuroscience

•             Neuronal bases of Visual perception

•             Neuronal bases of Time perception

•             SISSA Explorations into the Neuronal foundations of Sensory Experience (SENSEx)

•             Neuronal bases of multimodal communication

•             Neural computation approaches to memory and brain organization

•             Computational bases of perception and cognition


Durata / Duration: 4 anni / 4 years


Modalità di selezione  / Selection Process:  Titoli  - orale (da remoto)

Academic qualifications - interview (remotely)

13/04 - 14/04/2026

item.title: Bando di ammissione al corso di PhD in Genomica Funzionale e Strutturale / Selection for the admission to the Functional and Structural Genomics PhD course
item.description:
Responsabile del Corso / Head of PhD course: Prof. Giuseppe Legname

From: 18-12-2025 13:00
To: 02-04-2026 13:00
Category: Dottorati

Bando di ammissione al corso di PhD in Genomica Funzionale e Strutturale

Selection for the admission to the Functional and Structural Genomics PhD course


Topics:


• Functional genomics

• Cerebral cortex development

• Prion biology

• Computational genomics

• Neurodevelopmental and neurodegenerative disorders

• Bioinformatics

• Neurogenomics

• Structural biology

• Molecular and cellular biology

• Evolutionary and comparative genomics

• Drug discovery

• Invertebrates neurogenetics

• Epitranscriptomic modulation of CNS development and function

• Aging


Durata / Duration: 4 anni / 4 years


Modalità di selezione  / Selection Process:  Titoli - orale (da remoto)

Academic qualifications - interview (remotely)

(22/04 - 23/04 /2026)

item.title: Bando di ammissione al corso di PhD in Biofisica Statistica e Molecolare / Selection for the admission to the Molecular and Statistical Biophysics PhD course
item.description:
Responsabile del Corso / Head of PhD course: Prof. Giovanni BUSSI

From: 18-12-2025 13:00
To: 11-05-2026 13:00
Category: Dottorati

Avviso di selezione ad evidenza pubblica per l'ammissione ai Corsi di Dottorato di ricerca  - phd-msb-01-2026


Topics:


• Statistical mechanics of complex molecular systems

• Activity-driven biological processes

• Stochastic processes and biological noise

• Biomolecular simulations

• Simulations of rare events

• Soft Matter Physics


Durata / Duration: 4 anni / 4 years


Modalità di selezione  / Selection Process:  Titoli  - scritto - orale (da remoto) Academic qualifications - written - interview (remotely) (25/05 - 26 & 27/05/2026)

item.title: Bando di ammissione al corso di PhD in Neurobiologia / Selection for the admission to the Neurobiology PhD course
item.description:
Responsabile del Corso / Head of PhD course: Prof. Laura BALLERINI

From: 18-12-2025 13:00
To: 25-03-2026 13:00
Category: Dottorati

Avviso di selezione ad evidenza pubblica per l'ammissione ai Corsi di Dottorato di ricerca - phd-neurobio-01-2026


Topics:


• Peripheral Nervous System

• Pain, touch and itch

• Synaptic Neurophysiology and Neuronal Networks

• Optogenetic and electrophysiological approaches to Neuronal Networks

• Neurotoxicity and calcium signalling

• Spatiotemporal dynamics of calcium signalling in neuroglia

• Neurophysiology of Motor control

• Spinal networks patho-physiology and locomotion

• Respiratory physiology

• Neurophysiology and neuropharmacology of spinal motoneurons

• Visual systems and feature detection

• Simultaneous acquisition of neural activity and behavior

• Innate behaviors and their underlying circuits

• Functional imaging approaches to neural circuits

• Neuroecology

• Auditory system and multisensory integration

• Computational neuroscience and modelling

• Brain states and neuromodulation

• Sensory information processing abnormalities in psychiatric disorders


Durata / Duration: 4 anni / 4 years


Modalità di selezione  / Selection Process:  Titoli  - orale (da remoto) Academic qualifications -  interview (remotely) ( 22.04 - 23.04.2026)
